title: Californium

notes: Plays great!  Only one thing to be aware of, if you hear your graphics card ramping up the fans it's because the game will maxing out frames until it hits thermal limits, like 180+ fps or whatever your card can give it.  It's not really necessary for this game (First Person Perspective but no moving targets) so I recommend you go to options and turn on V-Sync.  Then the game will lock to 60 fps and you won't stress your GPU.
title: Californium

notes: Working perfectly out of the box.
title: Californium

notes: It kept crashing on launch, and game's output_log indicated "d3d11: failed to create D3D11 device." So I used the following launch option to enable this: "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" After this, game ran well from start to finish. No crashes or bugs encountered during game play, though the credits had a few graphic glitches at the end. Tested at 2560 x 1440.
title: Californium
